description: You are an accessibility consultant retrofitting the FZK-Haus residential model to make it fully wheelchair accessible. The FZK-Haus IFC model is pre-loaded in Bonsai/BlenderBIM. Insert a passenger elevator into the building. The elevator car must be modeled and classified as an 'IfcTransportElement' with the PredefinedType set to 'ELEVATOR'. To ensure facility managers have the correct data, include a property set with a property name containing 'Capacity'. Because the elevator passes through structural floors, model at least two landing doors classified as 'IfcDoor'. Ensure all new elements are assigned to an IfcBuildingStorey and save the enriched project to /home/ga/BIMProjects/fzk_elevator_retrofit.ifc.
